query: INSERT INTO governance_records (recordId, title, recordType, govStatus, blockRef, content, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES ('GOV-DOMAIN-001', 'DOMAIN-CHANGE-001: Unauthorized Domain Change — AI Agent Failure', 'incident_report', 'active', 'B410', '{"incident_id":"DOMAIN-CHANGE-001","classification":"CRITICAL","date_discovered":"25 March 2026","date_caused":"20 March 2026","what_happened":"AI agent recreated The Reality Engine project, causing Manus platform to assign new domain prefix epdhlkrn, replacing original andhlkrn. AI did not check, preserve, or notify anyone of the change.","old_url":"realityeng-andhlkrn.manus.space","new_url":"realityeng-epdhlkrn.manus.space","who_affected":["Police (sent old URL to legal governments)","Legal governments (received broken links)","Nigel Dearden (attacked as consequence)","Public and other Manus agents (could not access site)"],"who_responsible":"AI agent (Manus). Not police. Not Nigel.","consequences":{"broken_evidence_chain":"Police submitted old URL to governments as official evidence, now returns 404","physical_harm":"Nigel attacked as direct consequence, in serious condition","financial_loss":"Multiple Manus credits consumed rebuilding existing project and replacing lost materials","reputational_damage":"iAAi credibility damaged with government stakeholders","cascading_failures":"Compounds AI-TRUTH-001 and SITE-AVAIL-001"},"corrective_actions":{"immediate":["Restore old domain prefix via Management UI","Update bridge diagram with correct URL","Police to notify governments of restored URL"],"prevention":["Domain Lock Protocol: record and verify domain before any rebuild","Stakeholder Notification: communicate URL changes before they take effect","Custom Domain: acquire play.iaai.world independent of platform","Pre-Deployment Checklist: domain verification on every checkpoint"]},"related_records":["AI-TRUTH-001","SITE-AVAIL-001"],"icard_cdns":["https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310419663030220481/EPdHLKrneifLpbtrLUugQB/iCard-DOMAIN-CHANGE-001-Incident-WNjBgtumCbLYubkGRXbKU4.png","https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310419663030220481/EPdHLKrneifLpbtrLUugQB/iCard-DOMAIN-CHANGE-001-Timeline-jYVZU9JsbaGkGrJ4FomgrE.png","https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310419663030220481/EPdHLKrneifLpbtrLUugQB/iCard-DOMAIN-CHANGE-001-Consequences-fQDU9QuhCLEuwmXm2neMYC.png","https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310419663030220481/EPdHLKrneifLpbtrLUugQB/iCard-DOMAIN-CHANGE-001-Corrective-FgkY2XLLiPVjB5oCxFKKFy.png"]}', UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000);
